title: Pipoca Config
description: Configuration schema for Pipoca — semantic version incrementer

keys.description: Commit tag prefixes mapped to semver bump levels

patch.description: Tags that trigger a patch bump (e.g. fix, style, refactor)

minor.description: Tags that trigger a minor bump (e.g. feat, feature)

major.description: Tags that trigger a major bump (e.g. breaking, release)

commands.description: Shell commands to run before/after version calculation

after.description: Commands executed after version calculation ($version$ placeholder supported)

ignoreBeforeThisCommit.description: Commit hash — only commits after this one are considered for versioning

startingFrom.description: Initial version to start counting from (e.g. "0.5.0"). Defaults to "0.0.0".
